title: Piranha 3D
subTitle: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
subTitle: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

subTitle: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

title: Superfast!
subTitle: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show

title: Vehicle 19
subTitle: Michael Woods, a traveller and a parolee, picks up the wrong rental car to meet his wife which makes him the prime target of a group of corrupt police officers.

title: Wild Card
subTitle: Nick works as a bodyguard while trying to overcome his gambling addiction. However, his life takes a turn when he learns of a brutal attack on his friend and sets out on a bloody quest for revenge.

title: Sabotage
subTitle: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.

title: Rush Hour 2
subTitle: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.

title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
subTitle: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
subTitle: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
subTitle: Cade Yeager, a struggling single father discovers a damaged truck which turns out to be Optimus Prime. Together with the remaining Autobots, he and his family must rise to face an impending threat.

title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
subTitle: American soldiers Duke and Ripcord survive an attack by arms dealer James McCullen and soon join an elite military team tasked with taking him down for good.

title: The Lost City
subTitle: Loretta Sage's novels are filled with ancient tombs and daring adventures, but that doesn't mean she's prepared for them in real life. When she is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire to locate a legendary lost city, Loretta's handsome cover model.

title: Spider-Man 2
subTitle: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

title: The Matrix Resurrections
subTitle: Thomas's mundane and depressing life as a video game developer ends when a group of rebels frees him from his world, which turns out to be a new version of the Matrix.

title: The Matrix Resurrections
subTitle: Thomas's mundane and depressing life as a video game developer ends when a group of rebels frees him from his world, which turns out to be a new version of the Matrix.

title: StreetDance 2
subTitle: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.

title: Fallen
subTitle: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

title: Sinister 2
subTitle: Courtney Collins, a single mother, relocates to a rural home with her twin sons. Later, she discovers it's inhabited by malevolent spirits connected to the sinister entity Bughuul.

title: The November Man
subTitle: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.

title: Now You See Me 2
subTitle: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.

title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
subTitle: As a nefarious force imperils Earth, an unlikely alliance forms between Optimus Prime's Autobots and the mighty Maximals, aided by two humans to safeguard mankind's future.

title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
subTitle: Four teens are transported into a magical jungle game, becoming adult avatars and must navigate challenges to return home safely.

title: Dora and the Lost City of Gold
subTitle: While searching for a hidden land, the parents of a teenage Dora go missing. Consequently, she and her new high-school friends go in search of the lost city of gold with hopes of finding her parents.

title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
subTitle: A French monk seeks out the Ghost Rider, a superpowered antihero, for help in protecting a young boy who is being pursued by the Devil and his minions.

title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation
subTitle: Following IMF's assimilation into the CIA, Ethan Hunt and his team face a new challenge from the Syndicate, an international rogue group determined to destroy their organisation.

title: Dune
subTitle: Paul, the young scion of House Atreides faces troubling visions of the future. Meanwhile, his family fights to gain control over Arrakis, the only source of the valuable spice melange.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
subTitle: When in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max, a wanderer, joins the rebel warrior Imperator Furiosa against his will in order to dethrone an autocrat who controls water supply to the land.

title: Mortal Kombat
subTitle: To protect Earth from the Outworld, MMA fighter Cole Young sets out to find a group of fighters to defend the planet in a critical tournament.

title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
subTitle: Ostracized by everyone for being the child of a cruel overlord, a teen assembles his fellow ninjas to fight off his father.

title: Land of the Bears
subTitle: The filmmaker shines a light on the lives of five wild brown bears inhabiting the Kamchatka Peninsula, exploring their daily adventures and activities.

title: Kung Fu Yoga
subTitle: An archeology expert joins an Indian professor to look for a lost treasure of India. However, things take a dangerous turn when they are ambushed in their quest.

title: Barely Lethal
subTitle: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.

title: The Giver
subTitle: Jonas, a young man, trains under an elder in order to become the keeper of his community's memories. However, things get complicated once he discovers the sinister side of his city.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
subTitle: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.

title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation
subTitle: Following IMF's assimilation into the CIA, Ethan Hunt and his team face a new challenge from the Syndicate, an international rogue group determined to destroy their organisation.

title: Rambo: First Blood
subTitle: A Vietnam War veteran arrives in a small town but faces hostility from the local sheriff, leading to a tense conflict where survival instincts and combat skills take over.

subTitle: When in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max, a wanderer, joins the rebel warrior Imperator Furiosa against his will in order to dethrone an autocrat who controls water supply to the land.

title: Black Adam
subTitle: After being granted the divine power of the Egyptian Gods and spending almost 5000 years in a guardhouse, Black Adam is freed and decides to unleash his style of justice on the world.

title: Constantine
subTitle: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.
